'''shofachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labeled|labeled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labeled|labeled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shofachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shofachithi|shofachithi]] || [[word:shofachiji|shofachiji]] || [[word:shofachishi|shofachishi]] || [[word:shofachiki|shofachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shofachuthuthu|shofachuthuthu]] || [[word:shofachujuju|shofachujuju]] || [[word:shofachushushu|shofachushushu]] || [[word:shofachukuku|shofachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shofachuthu|shofachuthu]] || [[word:shofachuju|shofachuju]] || [[word:shofachushu|shofachushu]] || [[word:shofachuku|shofachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shofachufthuf|shofachufthuf]] || [[word:shofachufjuf|shofachufjuf]] || [[word:shofachufshuf|shofachufshuf]] || [[word:shofachufkuf|shofachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shofachethe|shofachethe]] || [[word:shofacheje|shofacheje]] || [[word:shofacheshe|shofacheshe]] || [[word:shofacheke|shofacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shofachothotho|shofachothotho]] || [[word:shofachojojo|shofachojojo]] || [[word:shofachoshosho|shofachoshosho]] || [[word:shofachokoko|shofachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shofachotho|shofachotho]] || [[word:shofachojo|shofachojo]] || [[word:shofachosho|shofachosho]] || [[word:shofachoko|shofachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shofachofthof|shofachofthof]] || [[word:shofachofjof|shofachofjof]] || [[word:shofachofshof|shofachofshof]] || [[word:shofachofkof|shofachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfthĂŻf|shofachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfjĂŻf|shofachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfshĂŻf|shofachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfkĂŻf|shofachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shofachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shofachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shofachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shofachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfthĂŻf|shofachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfjĂŻf|shofachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfshĂŻf|shofachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfkĂŻf|shofachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfthĂŻf|shofachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfjĂŻf|shofachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfshĂŻf|shofachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shofachĂŻfkĂŻf|shofachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shofachĂŠthĂŠ|shofachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shofachĂŠjĂŠ|shofachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shofachĂŠshĂŠ|shofachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shofachĂŠkĂŠ|shofachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shofachathatha|shofachathatha]] || [[word:shofachajaja|shofachajaja]] || [[word:shofachashasha|shofachashasha]] || [[word:shofachakaka|shofachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shofachatha|shofachatha]] || [[word:shofachaja|shofachaja]] || [[word:shofachasha|shofachasha]] || [[word:shofachaka|shofachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shofachafthaf|shofachafthaf]] || [[word:shofachafjaf|shofachafjaf]] || [[word:shofachafshaf|shofachafshaf]] || [[word:shofachafkaf|shofachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shofachasha|shofachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shofachshĂ«sha|shofachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shofachrosha|shofachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shofachmusha|shofachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shofachyasha|shofachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshofachnkshĂ«sha|goshofachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshofachnkrosha|goshofachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshofachnkmusha|goshofachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshofachnkyasha|goshofachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shofafachasha|shofafachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shofafachshĂ«sha|shofafachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shofafachrosha|shofafachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shofafachmusha|shofafachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shofafachyasha|shofafachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshofafachnkshĂ«sha|goshofafachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshofafachnkrosha|goshofafachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshofafachnkmusha|goshofafachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshofafachnkyasha|goshofafachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shefĂŠchasha|shefĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shefĂŠchshĂ«sha|shefĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shefĂŠchrosha|shefĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shefĂŠchmusha|shefĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shefĂŠchyasha|shefĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshefĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|goshefĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshefĂŠchnkrosha|goshefĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshefĂŠchnkmusha|goshefĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshefĂŠchnkyasha|goshefĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shofachasha|shofachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shofachshĂ«sha|shofachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shofachrosha|shofachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shofachmusha|shofachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shofachyasha|shofachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshofachnkshĂ«sha|goshofachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshofachnkrosha|goshofachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshofachnkmusha|goshofachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshofachnkyasha|goshofachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
